meta.title: Hard Top Dry Containers — 20ft & 40ft | Crystal Group
meta.description: Hard top containers with removable steel roof for top-loading heavy and irregularly shaped cargo. Ideal for glass, coal, automotive parts, and construction materials.

hero.name: Hard Top Dry Containers
hero.tagline: Removable roof — specially designed for easy top-loading and safe transport of heavy, oversized, and irregularly shaped cargo.

overview: Hard Top Dry Containers are built for transporting and storing heavy, oversized, and irregularly shaped cargo. These containers feature a removable hard roof for easy top-loading and unloading with cranes. They are ideal for cargo such as glass sheets, raw materials like coal, automotive parts, bulk freight like cement, large machinery, and construction materials.

features.title: Removable Roof Design
features.desc: Hard steel roof panels can be removed for easy top-loading and unloading of bulky cargo such as machinery, steel, and heavy equipment.

features.title: Dual Door Access
features.desc: Doors at both front and top open to simplify loading and unloading of oversized materials.

features.title: Weatherproof Protection
features.desc: Strong steel body safeguards cargo from rain, sunlight, and snow during transit and long-term storage.

features.title: ISO-Standard
features.desc: Compliant with international shipping container standards for seamless multimodal transport by road, sea, and rail.

faq.q: What is a hard top dry container?
faq.a: A hard top dry container features a removable hard steel roof, specially designed for easy top-loading and safe transport of heavy, oversized, and irregularly shaped cargo.
Hard top dry containers are available in 10ft, 20ft, and 40ft sizes.
Removable hard roof for top-loading; dual access doors at both ends; weatherproof steel construction shielding cargo from rain, sun, and snow; ISO-standard dimensions for global shipping.

faq.q: Can hard top containers be customised?
faq.a: Yes. These containers can be modified to suit specific shipping needs, offering flexibility for various cargo requirements.

faq.q: Are they compliant with international shipping standards?
faq.a: Yes. They adhere to ISO-standard dimensions, ensuring compatibility with global shipping regulations and seamless transportation across sea, rail, and road.

faq.q: What types of cargo are they best suited for?
faq.a: Hard top containers are ideal for glass sheets, raw materials like coal, automotive parts, bulk freight like cement, large machinery, and construction materials.
